description: Determine whether zone ratios or factors propagate. Each time the zone size factor ( building-blocks edge factor ) or ratio ( building-blocks edge ratio ) of an edge is changed, the changes are propagated to all face connected opposite edges. If building-blocks edge ratio-isolate is set to true , the changes will not propagate from the edge. The default setting is false .

6.0.reason: Not listed in the official FLAC3D 6.0 command indexes.

7.0.description: Determine whether zone ratios or factors propagate. Each time the zone size factor (building-blocks edge factor) or ratio (building-blocks edge ratio) of an edge is changed, the changes are propagated to all face connected opposite edges. If building-blocks edge ratio-isolate is set to true, the changes will not propagate from the edge. The default setting is false.
